steps.title: Search Near You
steps.description: Enter your city and choose your vehicle type. Browse verified rental shops with real availability, transparent pricing, and genuine reviews.

steps.title: Book Instantly
steps.description: Select your dates, confirm your booking with secure online payment, and get instant confirmation. No paperwork, no waiting.

steps.title: Pick Up & Ride
steps.description: Head to the rental shop with your licence. Quick handover process. Hit the road and enjoy your ride. Return when done.
